concerns.text: Plan claims all 7 constitutional principles PASS, but research.md Section 1 explicitly states 'BLOCKING ISSUE: FR-001 and FR-011 have NO verified source found'. Without verified datasets, Principle I (Reproducibility) cannot be satisfied - results cannot be reproduced without data. Constitution Check table is misleading.

Plan references contracts/ directory with dataset.schema.yaml and analysis.schema.yaml, but data-model.md defines 4 entities (DatasetRecord, AnalysisResult, VisualizationOutput, SensitivityResult). Only 2 contract schemas exist - VisualizationOutput and SensitivityResult lack corresponding contract definitions, creating incomplete contract coverage.

Plan states 'Testing: pytest (contract tests, integration tests on analysis outputs)' but contracts/ only contains schema files, not test files. Contract test implementation (test_dataset_schema.py, test_analysis_schema.py) is listed in tests/ but not exercised by any plan step - no plan element shows how contracts are validated during pipeline execution.
